textByHash.27500bdb6721588a09e99680732f34cac6dbb35e: Hmmm, tasty. I'm guessing you don't want to come round and try it?
textByHash.2e78898c08f9ca34d2684c97af79e202d33237b7: Eat it, of course! It will be fermented just-right by now.
textByHash.c1a4518c8cdd11af3b5b5b431e0fbd015a557496: Ah, today is a surströmming day! The herring I buried six months ago is ready to be dug up.
